ExtraProperties.Name: WHPApplianceTC
ExtraProperties.Label: Terms and Conditions
ExtraProperties.Text:
1. The Building Electrification Program is funded by California utility ratepayers under the auspices of the California Public Utilities Commission (“CPUC”) and is implemented by Maroma Energy Services (Maroma) through a contract with Southern California Edison (SCE). This Program may be modified or terminated without prior notice and Program funds are provided to eligible customers on a first-come, first-served basis until Program funds are no longer available.

  2. Actual savings may vary and will depend on numerous factors, including geographic location, weather conditions, equipment installed, usage rates and similar factors.

  3. I understand that I may need to contact SCE to update my rate plan and failure to update my plan may negatively affect my bill.

  4. The Program offer customers a limited number of energy-efficient models to help reduce energy bills. Replacement units may not be equipped with the same features as your existing units, and you may decline the new energy-efficient products (also referred to as “measures”) being offered for any reason.

  5. I understand that the measure(s) identified on this form have been installed at the specified installation address by an authorized, licensed contractor and that the installation occurred in an agreed upon location.

  6. I understand the contractor MUST install all measures in accordance with all local, state, and federal building codes and agree to grant permission to SCE, Maroma, city, county, state or municipal building inspectors and any other Program representatives, as applicable, reasonable access to my home and property to perform any applicable inspection(s).

    1. If an inspector finds that any work related to the installed measures requires adjustment, repair or, replacement due to permit requirements, an authorized Program contractor will perform such work at no charge to you.

    2. I understand that upon acceptance of the replacement measure(s), the equipment or product(s) being replaced will be dismantled and recycled in accordance with all applicable laws.

    3. I understand that any other additional services, installations, improvements, or equipment not specifically listed on the Installation Report and provided to me by the contractor have NOT been authorized by Maroma and SCE, and Maroma and SCE assume no responsibility for said item(s).

  7. All approved Measures are provided at no cost.

  8. I understand that the contractor will provide me with a copy of the manufacturer’s product guide and instructed me about the proper operation of the measure(s) and explained any applicable warranties.

  9. Once the measure(s) have been installed by the contractor, the removal, replacement, modification, or failure to properly maintain the installed measure(s) may void all applicable warranties.

    1. I agree that I will release Maroma and SCE from any claims, and that Maroma and SCE will not be liable in any manner, for any damages or losses that arise out of or in conjunction with the installation of the measure(s), including, but not limited to the installation or operation of said measure(s).

    2. I understand that I am responsible to read the owner’s manual and to complete and mail-in the warranty card included for each applicable measure that I may receive from the program.

    3. I understand the contractor offers a parts and labor warranty as defined on this form, and I agree to contact the contractor for concerns related to the work performed and for all warranty-related matters.

  10. I acknowledge and agree that Maroma and SCE shall not be liable in any manner, for any damages or losses arising out of any act or omission of the contractor or any sub-contractor of the contractor in performing the work to install the measures or arising out of or in conjunction with the installation and operation of the measure(s) (the Work), and I hereby release and waive Maroma and SCE from and against all claims that may arise in connection with the Work.

    1. I agree to hold the assigned contractor solely responsible for the performance of the Work and for all claims, losses, liabilities, damages and expenses (including attorneys’ fees and costs) that may arise because of the Work.

  11. Furthermore, I agree to defend, indemnify and hold harmless Maroma and SCE and its respective officers and employees against any and all action, liability, damages, demands or costs, for injury to or death or any and all persons whatsoever, and for any and all damage to property, in any manner arising from, or in connection with, the performance of the Work hereunder, except for the damages caused solely by the gross negligence or willful misconduct of Maroma or SCE.

  12. I understand that should I have any questions regarding the installed measure(s), the contractor or any item contained on this form, that I may contact Maroma’s Customer Solution Center at 909-296-6036 for additional information.

ExtraProperties.Name: WarrantyInformation
ExtraProperties.Text:
Warranty Information:

  1. The appliance/equipment distributor offers a two-year parts and labor warranty. For defective products, contact the distributor at the number provided below. 
  2. The service provider warrants the workmanship on the installed measure(s) for one year from the date of installation.

ExtraProperties.Name: CustomerDeclarationCheckbox
MapHelpText
ExtraProperties.Text: If the Signature Location is incorrect, uncheck the Customer Declaration checkbox, save the response, and then close. This will allow the response to reset its current location. After editing the response, you can re-check the Customer Declaration box to obtain the current location.
